post_rendered:
Mafia Game 243 :\

Game Over. Mafia Won.

Credit to various rulesets for influencing this one.

Flavor
stawburry


Please read all the rules and confirm.

Don't Do These
  • Don't post at night.
  • Don't post in the thread if you are dead. There is a dead chat if you want to keep talking about the game.
  • Don't edit or delete posts that you have already submitted. Use EBWOP or EBWON if needed.
  • Don't quote/pretend to quote mod communications. Paraphrase.
  • Don't ask the moderator questions in the thread. Use your role PM.
  • Don't use any sort of formatting that conceals text.
  • Don't use any mod colors or anything similar (see Moderator/Co-Moderator).
  • Don't OOT (up to moderator discretion).
  • Don't be immature (up to mod discretion).
  • Don't make personal attacks.
  • Don't flake or be inactive.
  • Don't angleshoot (up to moderator discretion).
  • Don't gamethrow.
  • Don't abuse loopholes.
  • Don't argue with the mods. Their word is final.


Voting/Hangs
  • The game is deadline hang, so at the end of the deadline, the player with the most votes will be hanged.
  • In the case of a tie between multiple players, the player who reached the number of votes first will be hanged.
  • Starting Day 2, majority is ON, so if a player reaches a majority of the votes, they will be hanged.
  • The moment deadline passes or a player reaches a majority of the votes (Day 2 onwards), they will be hanged. It will then be twilight. Players are allowed to post during twilight, but no votes will be counted. Twilight ends when the mod makes the official end of day post.
  • Your votes should be in the format Vote: [player name]. The player's name should be bold, spelled perfectly, and capitalized perfectly. For example, Vote: BobDBuilder321 is acceptable, while Vote: bobdbuilder321, Vote: BobDBuilder, and Vote: BobDBuilder321 are not acceptable.
  • The exception to this rule is that if the vote looks fine to the naked eye, then the vote will be counted. Exceptions that fall under this category are lowercase L and uppercase i, zero width joiners, etc.
  • Votes in quotes and hide tags will not count.
  • Tell me (in PM) one thing you shouldn't do this game.
  • Incorrect votes will not be counted under any circumstances.
  • Votes are locked in LYLO.

Activity
  • Each mafia day will be 144 hours (6 days).
  • Each mafia night will be 48 hours (2 days).
  • If a player's night action isn't submitted by the night deadline, they will lose their opportunity to submit a night action.
  • If a player doesn't post (in thread) in a 36 hour period (1.5 days), they will get a PM prod. If the player doesn't post for another 24 hours (1 day), they will be replaced unless they post before a replacement is found. There are no In-Game prods.
  • If a player receives too many PM prods (up to moderator discretion), they will be replaced.
  • If a player is going to be V/LA, they must post it in bold (in thread) or PM the moderator. During V/LA, the player will not be prodded.
  • The moderator has a right to deny a player V/LA if it is too long (moderator discretion) or the player has taken too many (also moderator discretion).
  • Activity is reset every day.
  • Activity posts aren't counted as real posts, and will be ignored during activity checks.
  • If a player has been flaking for a long time (up to moderator discretion), they are at risk of being force-replaced.

Setup
This game will use a custom open setup.

Town
- 9 Vanilla Townies
- 1 Town Universal Backup
- 1 Town One-Shot Vigilante
- 1 Town Healer

Mafia
- 2 Mafia Goons
- 1 Three-Shot Mafia Poisoner

Role PMs
Vanilla Townie Role PM wrote:
Hello, [Player], you are a Vanilla Townie.

You have no abilities besides your voice and vote, so use them well. You win when all threats to town are eliminated.
Town Universal Backup PM wrote:
Hello, [Player], you are a Town Universal Backup.

You will inherit the abilities of the first town power role to die. You win when all threats to town are eliminated.
Town One-Shot Vigilante Role PM wrote:
Hello, [Player], you are a Town One-Shot Vigilante.

You may shoot someone on one night, killing them. You win when all threats to town are eliminated.
Town Healer Role PM wrote:
Hello, [Player], you are a Town Healer.

Every day, you may heal a player, preventing them from dying to poison that day. You win when all threats to town are eliminated.
Mafia Goon Role PM wrote:
Hello, [Player], you are a Mafia Goon. Your partners are [Player], who is a Mafia Goon, and [Player], who is a Mafia Three-Shot Poisoner.

Every night, you and your partners can submit a factional kill, killing the target. Additionally, you can talk with your partners here: [Link] at all times during the game. You win when you achieve parity with Town or nothing can stop this from happening.
Mafia Three-Shot Poisoner Role PM wrote:
Hello, [Player], you are a Mafia Three-Shot Poisoner. You partners are [Player] and [Player], who are both a Mafia Goon.

Three nights, you can poison someone and fake poison 2 others. The next day, it will be publicly announced that all 3 of these players are poisoned, with no distinction being made between fake and regular poisons. At the end of the day, the player who wasn't fake poisoned will die, if not healed.

Every night, you and your partners can submit a factional kill, killing the target. Additionally, you can talk with your partners here: [Link] at all times during the game. You win when you achieve parity with Town or nothing can stop this from happening.


Questions about setup should be sent in your Role PM, otherwise we cannot guarantee it will be answered.

Moderator/Co-Moderator
  • BobDBuilder321 is the moderator of Mafia Game 243 and EulerNTM is its co-moderator.
  • All mod/co-mod posts will be done in blue (#00f). Don't use any shade of blue.
  • All town related things will be done in green (#0f0). Don't use any shade of green.
  • All mafia related things will be done in red (#f00). Don't use any shade of red.


Alive(3)
1. juliankuang - Vanilla Townie
2. MrVancoover fifty51 - Vanilla Townie
3. mark888 - Mafia Goon

Dead(12)

12. rosecasket - Vanilla Townie


Warnings
  • This game uses the 3-strike rule. After 3 warnings, players will be force-replaced or modkilled, based on moderator discretion.
  • For a minor rule infraction, players will receive one warning, for a major rule infraction, players will receive 2-3 warnings (based on moderator discretion).
  • MrVancoover receives a warning (1/3).
  • candythecorgi receives a warning (1/3).
  • alpha_zom recieves a warning (1/3).

Confirm Counts/Votecounts/Activity Checks
  • The confirm counts will be in the following format: 0.[number]. The number reflects which Confirm Count it is. For example, CC 0.1 is the 1st confirm count.
  • Votecounts and activity checks will be in the following format: [number].[number]. The 1st number reflects the day and the 2nd number reflects which VC/AC of the day it is. For example, VC 3.2 is the 2nd votecount of Day 3.

    Activity Checks

    • AC 6.1
    • AC 6.2

V/LAs and PM Prods
  • Any V/LAs or PM Prods that have been struck through have been resolved (either by the V/LA ending or if the person being prodded either posts or is replaced).
V/LAs
  • awesomeming327. (9/25-9/27)
  • alpha_zom (10/9-10/12)
  • mark888 (10/25-10/27)
PM Prods
  • PM prod sent to Osmium_.

  • PM prod sent to alpha_zom.

Significant Events
  • OP Posted, Pre-Game starts.
  • Option to shrink night phases offered to roles with night actions.
  • D1 starts.
  • Clarification on the setup.
  • Another clarification on setup.
  • candythecorgi replaces cw357.

  • smh/why would you do this/please inform us if you saw who deleted 60-ish posts without us noticing.
  • im a skrub/Clarification on No Hang/I forgot to put rules regarding No Hang in the OP.
  • D6 ends, gg.

post_rendered:
I forgot to clarify this under "Setup". IF the Universal Backup inherits the One-Shot Vigilante role, they will start off with the same number of shots their predecessor had when they died. So, if the One-Shot Vigilante uses their shot and then dies, the Universal Backup will inherit ZERO shots.

Another thing I'd like to clarify is that the Universal Backup ONLY inherits actions. If they flip, they will flip as a Universal Backup, not the role they (might have) inherited. This doesn't really make a difference if people have common sense, but thought I'd point it out.
post_canonical:
[b][color=#00f]I forgot to clarify this under "Setup". IF the Universal Backup inherits the One-Shot Vigilante role, they will start off with the same number of shots their predecessor had when they died. So, if the One-Shot Vigilante uses their shot and then dies, the Universal Backup will inherit ZERO shots. 

Another thing I'd like to clarify is that the Universal Backup ONLY inherits actions. If they flip, they will flip as a Universal Backup, not the role they (might have) inherited. This doesn't really make a difference if people have common sense, but thought I'd point it out.[/color][/b]

BobDBuilder321 wrote:
Mafia Game 243 :\

If you're not alive in this game, DO NOT POST. If you want to join a game, please go the Mafia Game Signups.

If you want to spectate, please PM me.

Credit to various rulesets for influencing this one.

Flavor
stawburry


Please read all the rules and confirm.

Don't Do These
  • Don't post at night.
  • Don't post in the thread if you are dead. There is a dead chat if you want to keep talking about the game.
  • Don't edit or delete posts that you have already submitted. Use EBWOP or EBWON if needed.
  • Don't quote/pretend to quote mod communications. Paraphrase.
  • Don't ask the moderator questions in the thread. Use your role PM.
  • Don't use any sort of formatting that conceals text.
  • Don't use any mod colors or anything similar (see Moderator/Co-Moderator).
  • Don't OOT (up to moderator discretion).
  • Don't be immature (up to mod discretion).
  • Don't make personal attacks.
  • Don't flake or be inactive.
  • Don't angleshoot (up to moderator discretion).
  • Don't gamethrow.
  • Don't abuse loopholes.
  • Don't argue with the mods. Their word is final.


Voting/Hangs
  • The game is deadline hang, so at the end of the deadline, the player with the most votes will be hanged.
  • In the case of a tie between multiple players, the player who reached the number of votes first will be hanged.
  • Starting Day 2, majority is ON, so if a player reaches a majority of the votes, they will be hanged.
  • The moment deadline passes or a player reaches a majority of the votes (Day 2 onwards), they will be hanged. It will then be twilight. Players are allowed to post during twilight, but no votes will be counted. Twilight ends when the mod makes the official end of day post.
  • Your votes should be in the format Vote: [player name]. The player's name should be bold, spelled perfectly, and capitalized perfectly. For example, Vote: BobDBuilder321 is acceptable, while Vote: bobdbuilder321, Vote: BobDBuilder, and Vote: BobDBuilder321 are not acceptable.
  • The exception to this rule is that if the vote looks fine to the naked eye, then the vote will be counted. Exceptions that fall under this category are lowercase L and uppercase i, zero width joiners, etc.
  • Votes in quotes and hide tags will not count.
  • Tell me (in PM) one thing you shouldn't do this game.
  • Incorrect votes will not be counted under any circumstances.
  • Votes are locked in LYLO.

Activity
  • Each mafia day will be 144 hours (6 days).
  • Each mafia night will be 48 hours (2 days).
  • If a player's night action isn't submitted by the night deadline, they will lose their opportunity to submit a night action.
  • If a player doesn't post (in thread) in a 36 hour period (1.5 days), they will get a PM prod. If the player doesn't post for another 24 hours (1 day), they will be replaced unless they post before a replacement is found. There are no In-Game prods.
  • If a player receives too many PM prods (up to moderator discretion), they will be replaced.

post_rendered:
6 people woke up the next morning and grieved the loss of the Town Healer.

fifty, rosecasket, and mark888 stared each other down while tumbleweed bounced in the background.

candy sat in the corner of the room, picking at her fingernails. julian and alpha were tired and started sleeping on the floor.

"Why did you bonk BESTBROs?" fifty asked, "He did nothing wrong, as far as I am concerned."

rosecasket paced the floor, and then dramatically pointed towards fifty51, "Oh yeah? Then why did you do nothing to stop it if it was wrong? In fact, why should I believe that you are not evil??"

"But I tried asking why meepster was scum," fifty said, "and plus, I'm the Healer."

mark888 butted in. "That's impossible!" He exclaimed "We just saw our precious healer die!"

(silence)

"Oops."

fifty broke the uncomfortable tension "Well, its probably one of those lazy people over the-"

rosecasket interrupted him "Actually I think its either mark or candy, because me, you, alpha, and julian are town."

"Eh, I can't tell what mark is doing."

Before you could say "supercalifragilisticexpialadocious" - wait, you probably could say this before then but I digress - rosecasket, candythecorgi, and alpha_zom had mark pressed against the wall.

mark could barely talk while being held right at the wall. "Woah, *cough* what is this all about?"

"You are just a better hang" rosecasket said.

mark struggled, and then let out a massive tantrum "NO NO NO NO NOOOOO!!!! I AM TOWN, AND I WANT TO WIN!!!! GET AWAY FROM MEEEEEEE"

The 3 people holding mark jumped back by this crazy outburst of emotions.

"It's candythecorgi" mark announced. "I just know it!"

"Candy, candy, candy" everyone started chanting. They moved forward and cornered her to the edge of a ledge.

"Wait, it isn't me! No, stop!"

But it was too late. candythecorgi was pushed off of a ledge, and fell into the abyss. She was a Vanilla Townie.

"Bwahahahahaha!" a voice screamed from beyond the ledge. "You fools! The mafia will surely win now!"

Everyone then fainted out of exhaustion and fear.

"What did we do wrong..."

post_rendered:
After the group recovered, fifty, rosecasket, and mark ran over to check the ledge to see if there was any way of recovering candy.

Unfortunately, candy was nowhere to be seen in the deep, dark pit. A weird gurgling sound started to come from the pit, echoing off the walls and forming a song:


dà tù zi bìng le èr tù zi qiáo
sān tù zi mǎi yào sì tù zi áo
wǔ tù zi mò míng yūn diào...


"Wait a minute, I recognize this song from somewhere." rosecasket said.

"How could you possibly recognize gibberish like this??" fifty yelled.

rose snapped their fingers "Oh yeah, this is from one of Hu Tao's idling animations! Hmm, lemme search up the meaning of the lyrics."

"?????????????????"

"Here, take a look at this." rosecasket pulled their phone out and showed them the translation.

"Rabbit 1 got sick, Rabbit 2 treated him, Rabbit 3 brought the medicine, Rabbit 4 cooked the medicine, Rabbit 5 died, Rabbit 6-"

silence

"%^$&!" rosecasket said.

The 3 players raced back to the house they were living in, and saw julian sitting in the corner but alpha missing.

"Julian, where is alpha?????"

"He left to go somewhere in the forest."

"Dude, we have to go catch him!

They recognized alpha's footprints and followed them into the forest, until they reached a tombstone sitting in the middle of a small clearing.

On the tombstone, these words were inscribed:


Here lies alpha_zom (??? - 2021). He was the Town One-Shot Vigilante.


"Oh crap."


Night 5 has ended and Day 6 has started on October 30th, 5 PM EST. Day 6 will end on November 5th, 5 PM EST.
